message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Register Client Sequence Diagram

actor "Client" as client
participant "RegisterClientUI" as ui
participant "RegisterClientController" as controller
participant "ApplicationPOT\nApplicationPOT" as app
participant "EncryptPassword" as encrypt
participant "EmailSender" as email
participant "DataHandler" as data

client -> ui: 1 Engages the register feature/button
ui --> client: Asks for all the information required\nfor the register (i.e. name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,\nstreetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,\nCCV)
client -> ui: 3 Fills all the information required
ui --> client: 4 Presents the data and asks for a confirmation
client -> ui: 5 Confirms

ui -> controller: 6 registerNewClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
activate controller
controller -> app: 7 create()
activate app
app -> app: 8 create()
deactivate app
controller -> app: 9 validateInput(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
activate app
deactivate app

alt if all the information given as input has a valid format
    app -> app: 10 newClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
    activate app
    app -> app: 11 create(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
    activate app
    app -> app: 12 create(email,password,nif,name)
    activate app
    app -> encrypt: 13 encryptPasswordMD5(password)
    activate encrypt
    deactivate encrypt
    app -> app: 14 create(latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country)
    activate app
    app -> app: 15 create(creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
    activate app
    deactivate app
    deactivate app
    deactivate app
    controller -> app: 16 registerNewClient(client)
    activate app
    app -> app: 17 addClientToDB(client)
    activate app
    app -> app: ref SD_CONNECTIONS
    deactivate app
    app -> email: 18 sendEmail(email,subject,body)
    activate email
    deactivate email
    deactivate app
    deactivate controller
    controller --> client: 19 Validates and informs about the success of the operation
else if any information does not have a valid format
    controller --> client: 20 Informs the User that the operation\nwas not successful!
end

@enduml
```
